All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AcknowledgmentProperties
Acknowledgment configuration properties.
AsyncConsumerAcknowledgmentCustomizer
Create a bean of this type to inject a consumer acknowledgement customizer that will be used by the Connector Framework when messages are processed asynchronously.
BatchMessageFormat
Interface for defining batch message formats for different binders.
ConfigurationValidation
Provide a Bean of this type to validate the compatibility of user configurations across different components within a workflow.
ConnectorManagementProperties
Connector management configuration properties.
ConnectorProperties
Connector configuration properties.
ConnectorSecurityProperties
Connector security configuration properties.
ConnectorSecurityProperties.User
 
ConnectorTransformIndexAccessorProvider
Index accessor provider for the message transform feature.
ConnectorTransformPropertyAccessorProvider
Property accessor provider for the message transform feature.
ConstrainedReflectivePropertyAccessor
A reflective property accessor that only allows access to a specific method on a specific type.
ConsumerBinding
Represents a consumer binding configuration for a specific binder type and destination.
ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptor
Binding interceptor for consumer bindings.
ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptorFactory
Factory for creating binding-specific ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptor instances.
ConvertibleTypePair
A pair of types that can be converted from one to another.
LeaderElectionFailOverProperties
Leader election fail-over configuration properties.
LeaderElectionProperties
Leader election configuration properties.
LeaderElectionProperties.LeaderElectionMode
Leader election mode.
ProducerBinding
Represents the binding information for a producer in a Solace binder.
ProducerBindingMessageInterceptor
Binding interceptor for producer bindings.
ProducerBindingMessageInterceptorFactory
Factory for creating binding-specific ProducerBindingMessageInterceptor instances.
PublishAcknowledgmentProvider
Create this as a bean to inject a custom provider that will be used to notify the Connector Framework of when messages have been successfully/unsuccessfully published.
TargetMessageJacksonModuleProvider
Provider for a Jackson module that can be registered with the target message's ObjectMapper.
TransformProperties
 
TransformProperties.ExpressionProperties
 
TransformProperties.SourcePayloadProperties
 
TransformProperties.TargetPayloadProperties
 
WorkflowProperties
Workflow configuration properties.
